violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Items in fridge not dated.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. - Grey water found to be dumped on ground, staff will use proper ways to dispose of.
